headline: Caesars Entertainment Enters Into Agreement to Be Acquired by Fertitta Entertainment
summary: LAS VEGAS & RENO, Nev., May 28, 2026--Caesars Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: CZR) ("Caesars") announced today that it entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Fertitta Entertainment, Inc. ("Fertitta Entertainment") in an all-cash transaction valued at approximately $17.6 billion, including the assumption of approximately $11.9 billion of Caesars’ outstanding debt.

content.title: Caesars Entertainment Enters Into Agreement to Be Acquired by Fertitta Entertainment
content.summary: LAS VEGAS & RENO, Nev., May 28, 2026--Caesars Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: CZR) ("Caesars") announced today that it entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Fertitta Entertainment, Inc. ("Fertitta Entertainment") in an all-cash transaction valued at approximately $17.6 billion, including the assumption of approximately $11.9 billion of Caesars’ outstanding debt.
